mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM category WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} OR owner_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, color, icon, description, sort_order, owner_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{color}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{ownerId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, color = #{color}, icon = #{icon}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kpi WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (id, name, color, icon, description, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{color}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
